headline: Agentic Shopping Is Coming. These Stocks Will Ride Walmart’s Google AI Bet.
summary: Walmart just handed Google's Gemini AI the keys to its checkout lane, and the ripple effects stretch far beyond one retailer. Five stocks across logistics, robotics, payments, and merchant platforms stand to capture the most value as AI agents take over the shopping cart.

headline: The Broadening Trade: Your Next Move
summary: The Investment Committee debate whether you can believe in the broadening trade as stocks push higher across the board. They discuss their strategy for the second half of the year.
